name: BOC Schroder Credit Tianli Bond (LOF)
summary: BOC Schroder Credit Tianli Bond (LOF) is a bond fund that focuses on credit investments and is listed as an Open-Ended Fund (LOF). The fund invests primarily in fixed-income securities with a focus on credit quality, aiming to provide stable returns and capital preservation. It is managed by BOCOM Schroder Fund Management Co., Ltd., a joint venture between Bank of Communications and Schroders.
